title: noJsxLeakedDollar

import { Tabs, TabItem } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

<Tabs>
<TabItem label="JSX and TSX" icon="seti:javascript">
:::caution
This rule is part of the [nursery](/linter/#nursery) group. This means that it is experimental and the behavior can change at any time.
:::
## Summary
- Rule available since: `v2.4.13`
- Diagnostic Category: [`lint/nursery/noJsxLeakedDollar`](/reference/diagnostics#diagnostic-category)
- This rule has an [**unsafe**](/linter/#unsafe-fixes) fix.
- The default severity of this rule is [**warning**](/reference/diagnostics#warning).
- This rule belongs to the following domains:
  - [`react`](/linter/domains#react)
- Sources: 
  - Same as [`react-jsx/no-leaked-dollar`](https://eslint-react.xyz/docs/rules/jsx-no-leaked-dollar)
  - Same as [`@eslint-react/jsx-no-leaked-dollar`](https://eslint-react.xyz/docs/rules/jsx-no-leaked-dollar)

## How to configure
```json title="biome.json"
{
	"linter": {
		"rules": {
			"nursery": {
				"noJsxLeakedDollar": "error"
			}
		}
	}
}

```
## Description
Flags text nodes with a trailing `$` before a JSX expression.

This can happen when refactoring from a template literal to JSX and forgetting
to remove the dollar sign. This results in an unintentional `$` being rendered
as text in the output.

```jsx
function MyComponent({ user }) {
  return `Hello ${user.name}`;
}
```

When refactored to JSX, it might look like this:

```jsx
function MyComponent({ user }) {
  return <>Hello ${user.name}</>;
}
```

However, the `$` before `{user.name}` is unnecessary and will be rendered as text in the output.

## Examples

### Invalid

```jsx
function MyComponent({ user }) {
  return <div>Hello ${user.name}</div>;
}
```

<pre class="language-text"><code class="language-text">code-block.jsx:2:21 <a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-jsx-leaked-dollar">lint/nursery/noJsxLeakedDollar</a> <span style="color: #000; background-color: #ddd;"> FIXABLE </span> ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━<br /><br />  <strong><span style="color: Orange;">⚠</span></strong> <span style="color: Orange;">Possible unintentional </span><span style="color: Orange;"><strong>'$'</strong></span><span style="color: Orange;"> before a JSX expression.</span><br />  <br />    <strong>1 │ </strong>function MyComponent(&#123; user &#125;) &#123;<br />  <strong><span style="color: Tomato;">&gt;</span></strong> <strong>2 │ </strong>  return &lt;div&gt;Hello $&#123;user.name&#125;&lt;/div&gt;;<br />   <strong>   │ </strong>                    <strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><br />    <strong>3 │ </strong>&#125;<br />    <strong>4 │ </strong><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">This </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><strong>'$'</strong></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> will be rendered as text. Remove the </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><strong>'$'</strong></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> from the text node or add a suppression if it is intentional.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">This rule belongs to the nursery group, which means it is not yet stable and may change in the future. Visit </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery">https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery</a></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> for more information.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">Unsafe fix</span><span style="color: lightgreen;">: </span><span style="color: lightgreen;">Remove dollar sign.</span><br />  <br />  <strong>  2 │ </strong><span style="opacity: 0.8;">·</span><span style="opacity: 0.8;">·</span>return<span style="opacity: 0.8;">·</span>&lt;div&gt;Hello<span style="opacity: 0.8;">·</span><span style="color: Tomato;">$</span>&#123;user.name&#125;&lt;/div&gt;;<br />  <strong>    │ </strong>                    <span style="color: Tomato;">-</span>                  <br /></code></pre>

```jsx
function MyComponent({ user }) {
  return <div>${user.name} is your name</div>;
}
```

Remove the </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><strong>'$'</strong></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> from the text node or add a suppression if it is intentional.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">This rule belongs to the nursery group, which means it is not yet stable and may change in the future. Visit </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery">https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery</a></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> for more information.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">Unsafe fix</span><span style="color: lightgreen;">: </span><span style="color: lightgreen;">Remove dollar sign.</span><br />  <br />  <strong>  2 │ </strong><span style="opacity: 0.8;">·</span><span style="opacity: 0.8;">·</span>return<span style="opacity: 0.8;">·</span>&lt;div&gt;<span style="color: Tomato;">$</span>&#123;user.name&#125;<span style="opacity: 0.8;">·</span>is<span style="opacity: 0.8;">·</span>your<span style="opacity: 0.8;">·</span>name&lt;/div&gt;;<br />  <strong>    │ </strong>              <span style="color: Tomato;">-</span>                               <br /></code></pre>

### Valid

```jsx
function MyComponent({ user }) {
  return <div>Hello {user.name}</div>;
}
```

```jsx
// A lone `$` before a single expression is treated as intentional (e.g. a price).
function MyComponent({ price }) {
  return <div>${price}</div>;
}
```
